/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.6 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/lib CMakeFiles/myjson.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myjson.dir/src/parsejson.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myjson.dir/src/serializing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/myjson.dir/src/utility.cpp.o -o /Users/iamnidhogg/Desktop/MyJson/bin/myjson
